Ma=math S=screen sC=S.setColor dF=S.drawRectF dTX=S.drawText dTB=S.drawTextBox I=input O=output
function clamp(a,b,c) return Ma.min(Ma.max(a,b),c)end
DP={{8,12,18},{15,22,32},{35,45,60},{230,240,250},{100,115,130},{0,200,255},{80,220,255},{0,80,200},{20,200,100},{255,60,60},{255,170,0},{180,50,255},{0,255,180},{0,0,0},{255,255,255}} LP = { -- LIGHT MODE COLORS {200, 203, 210}, -- 1: Main BG (Off-White/Ice) {205, 212, 220}, -- 2: Panel BG (Light Grey-Blue) {180, 195, 210}, -- 3: Borders (Mid Grey-Blue) {10, 20, 35}, -- 4: Primary Text (Dark Marine) {80, 100, 120}, -- 5: Secondary Text (Slate) {0, 160, 220}, -- 6: Primary Cyan {0, 200, 255}, -- 7: Hover/Light Cyan {0, 80, 180}, -- 8: Deep Blue {10, 160, 80}, -- 9: Success Green {220, 30, 30}, -- 10: Alert Red {220, 130, 0}, -- 11: Warning Amber {140, 30, 200}, -- 12: Purple {0, 180, 140}, -- 13: Mint/Teal {50, 50, 50}, -- 14: Dark Grey / Shadow {255, 255, 255} -- 15: Pure White / Highlight }
function sc(s, A) local p = DP[s] if p then sC(p[1], p[2], p[3], A or 255) end end
function bs(x,xp,y,s,p,v) a=8 x=x+9*xp if p then sc(6)else if v==1 then sc(3)else sc(2)end end dF(x,y+1,a,a-1)dF(x+1,y,a-2,a+1)sc(4)if s==">" then x=x+1 end dTB(x,y,a,9,s,0,0)end
ST=false pta=false ptc=false e=0
function iR(rX,rY,rW,rH,t)return t and X>rX and Y>rY and X<rX+rW and Y<rY+rH end function ir(rX,u,rY)return iR(rX+u*9,rY,9,10,t)end function gN(...)local a={}for b,c in ipairs({...})do a[b]=I.getNumber(c)end;return table.unpack(a)end
function onTick()W,H,X,Y=gN(1,2,3,4)t=I.getBool(1) d=I.getBool(32)
clk=t and not ptc; ptc=t; O.setBool(1,clk)
n=W/2-46 m=H-63 onB=ir(n,0,m)twB=ir(n,1,m)thB=ir(n,2,m)foB=ir(n,3,m)fiB=ir(n,4,m)siB=ir(n,5,m)seB=ir(n,6,m)eiB=ir(n,7,m)niB=ir(n,8,m)zeB=ir(n,9,m)m=m+10 qB=ir(n,0,m)wB=ir(n,1,m)eB=ir(n,2,m)rB=ir(n,3,m)tB=ir(n,4,m)yB=ir(n,5,m)uB=ir(n,6,m)iB=ir(n,7,m)oB=ir(n,8,m)pB=ir(n,9,m)n=n+2+2 m=m+10 aB=ir(n,0,m)sB=ir(n,1,m)dB=ir(n,2,m)fB=ir(n,3,m)gB=ir(n,4,m)hB=ir(n,5,m)jB=ir(n,6,m)kB=ir(n,7,m)lB=ir(n,8,m)m=m+10 stB=iR(n-4,m,13,21,t)baB=iR(n+9*8,m,15,10,t)zB=ir(n,1,m)xB=ir(n,2,m)cB=ir(n,3,m)vB=ir(n,4,m)bB=ir(n,5,m)nB=ir(n,6,m)mB=ir(n,7,m) m=m+10 coB=ir(n,1,m)fuB=ir(n,7,m)spB=iR(n+9*2,m,44,10,t)et=iR(n+9*8,m,15,10,t)tab=iR(n-3,m,12,9,t)
if tab and pta~=tab then if ST then ST=false e=0 else ST=true e=29 end end
ou=0 if baB then ou=1 end if et then ou=2 end if onB then ou=3 end if twB then ou=4 end if thB then ou=5 end if foB then ou=6 end if fiB then ou=7 end if siB then ou=8 end if seB then ou=9 end if eiB then ou=10 end if niB then ou=11 end if zeB then ou=12 end if qB then ou=13+e end if wB then ou=14+e end if eB then ou=15+e end if rB then ou=16+e end if tB then ou=17+e end if yB then ou=18+e end if uB then ou=19+e end if iB then ou=20+e end if oB then ou=21+e end if pB then ou=22+e end if aB then ou=23+e end if sB then ou=24+e end if dB then ou=25+e end if fB then ou=26+e end if gB then ou=27+e end if hB then ou=28+e end if jB then ou=29+e end if kB then ou=30+e end if lB then ou=31+e end if zB then ou=32+e end if xB then ou=33+e end if cB then ou=34+e end if vB then ou=35+e end if bB then ou=36+e end if nB then ou=37+e end if mB then ou=38+e end if spB then ou=39+e end if coB then ou=40 end if fuB then ou=41 end pta=tab O.setNumber(9,ou) end
K="1234567890qwertyuiopasdfghjklzxcvbnm ,.!@#$%^&*()_{}[]:;\"\'+-=<>/?" function k(i)return string.sub(K,i,i)end
function onDraw()w=S.getWidth()h=S.getHeight()cw=w/2 ch=h/2 sc(1)dF(0,0,w,h) e=0 if ST then e=29 end x=cw-45 y=h-62

if spB then sc(6)else sc(2)end dF(x+9,y+1,44,7)dF(x+10,y,42,9)bs(x,0,y,",",coB,1)bs(x,6,y,".",fuB,1) if ST then sc(6)else sc(3)end dF(x+1-13,y,10,9)dF(x-13,y+1,12,7)x=cw-45 y=y-11 if baB then sc(6)else sc(3)end dF(x+76,y+2,13,7)dF(x+77,y+1,11,9)sc(4)dTX(x+79,y+3,"<-")dTX(x+4,y+13,"#")dF(x+38,y+13,10,1) y=y+10 if et then sc(6)else sc(8)end dF(x+76,y+2,13,7)dF(x+77,y+1,11,9) sc(4)dTX(x+79,y+1+2,"=>") end

e=string p=tonumber x=screen t=0.4 y=0 z=0 E=1
function a(b)
c=1 while d[c]do b=e.gsub(b,d[c][2],d[c][1])c=c+1 end
c=1 while f[c]do b=e.gsub(b,f[c][2],f[c][1])c=c+1 end
g={}h=1 i=0 j=e.find(b,";")
while j do g[h]={}k=e.sub(b,i+1,j)l=1 m=0
while m<e.len(k)do o=e.sub(k,m+1,m+8)
if o~=";"then c=p("0x"..e.sub(o,1,2))q=p("0x"..e.sub(o,3,4))r=p("0x"..e.sub(o,5,6))s=p("0x"..e.sub(o,7,8))
if s==0 then g[h][l]=false else g[h][l]={c,q,r,s}end end m=m+8 l=l+1 end
i=j j=e.find(b,";",j+1)h=h+1 end return g end
C=a(H)W={}k=1
while C and C[k]do o,S,L,cr,cg,cb,ca=1,-1,0,-1,-1,-1,-1
while C[k][o]~=nil do P=C[k][o]
if P then if P[1]==cr and P[2]==cg and P[3]==cb and P[4]==ca then L=L+1 else
if L>0 then W[#W+1]={S,k,L,cr,cg,cb,ca}end S,L,cr,cg,cb,ca=o,1,P[1],P[2],P[3],P[4]end
elseif L>0 then W[#W+1]={S,k,L,cr,cg,cb,ca}L=0 end o=o+1 end
if L>0 then W[#W+1]={S,k,L,cr,cg,cb,ca}end k=k+1 end
function onTick()end
function onDraw()if not C then return end
for i=1,#W do local c=W[i]x.setColor(c[4]*t,c[5]*t,c[6]*t,c[7]*E)x.drawRectF(y+c[1]-1,z+D-2+c[2],c[3],1)end end

e=string p=tonumber x=screen t=0.4 y=0 z=0 E=1
function a(b)
c=1 while d[c]do b=e.gsub(b,d[c][2],d[c][1])c=c+1 end
c=1 while f[c]do b=e.gsub(b,f[c][2],f[c][1])c=c+1 end
g={}h=1 i=0 j=e.find(b,";")
while j do g[h]={}k=e.sub(b,i+1,j)l=1 m=0
while m<e.len(k)do o=e.sub(k,m+1,m+8)
if o~=";"then c=p("0x"..e.sub(o,1,2))q=p("0x"..e.sub(o,3,4))r=p("0x"..e.sub(o,5,6))s=p("0x"..e.sub(o,7,8))
if s==0 then g[h][l]=false else g[h][l]={c,q,r,s}end end m=m+8 l=l+1 end
i=j j=e.find(b,";",j+1)h=h+1 end return g end
C=a(H)W={}k=1
while C and C[k]do o,S,L,cr,cg,cb,ca=1,-1,0,-1,-1,-1,-1
while C[k][o]~=nil do P=C[k][o]
if P then if P[1]==cr and P[2]==cg and P[3]==cb and P[4]==ca then L=L+1 else
if L>0 then W[#W+1]={S,k,L,cr,cg,cb,ca}end S,L,cr,cg,cb,ca=o,1,P[1],P[2],P[3],P[4]end
elseif L>0 then W[#W+1]={S,k,L,cr,cg,cb,ca}L=0 end o=o+1 end
if L>0 then W[#W+1]={S,k,L,cr,cg,cb,ca}end k=k+1 end
function onTick()end
function onDraw()if not C then return end
for i=1,#W do local c=W[i]x.setColor(c[4]*t,c[5]*t,c[6]*t,c[7]*E)x.drawRectF(y+c[1]-1,z+D-2+c[2],c[3],1)end end

d={{"q:","A"},{"-d","B"},{"o:","C"},{"r:","D"},{"IefIe","E"},{"1!","F"},{"-1S-1S-1S","J"},{"f#e:","K"},{"fb","L"},{"2j#2j#2j#","M"},{"#3v#3v#3v","N"},{"y:","P"},{"fa","O"},{"f9","Q"},{"-#5-#5-#5","R"},{"f8","S"},{"f7","T"},{"#8-#8-#8-","U"},{"fc:","j"},{"~z","k"},{"=:","l"},{"#4v#4v#4v","m"},{"-1f9-1f9-","n"},{":e:","p"},{"f6","o"},{"f5","q"},{"f4","r"},{"#6-#6-#6-","s"},{"~:","t"},{"#7-#7-#7-","u"},{"fd:","v"},{"f3","y"},{"f,","z"},{"f#,","!"},{"f2","="},{"f1","~"},{"00","#"},{":ef","-"},{"IefIefIef","_"},{"00ef",","},{"fef",":"}} e=string p=tonumber x=screen t=0.4 y=0 z=0 E=1
function a(b)
c=1 while d[c]do b=e.gsub(b,d[c][2],d[c][1])c=c+1 end
c=1 while f[c]do b=e.gsub(b,f[c][2],f[c][1])c=c+1 end
g={}h=1 i=0 j=e.find(b,";")
while j do g[h]={}k=e.sub(b,i+1,j)l=1 m=0
while m<e.len(k)do o=e.sub(k,m+1,m+8)
if o~=";"then c=p("0x"..e.sub(o,1,2))q=p("0x"..e.sub(o,3,4))r=p("0x"..e.sub(o,5,6))s=p("0x"..e.sub(o,7,8))
if s==0 then g[h][l]=false else g[h][l]={c,q,r,s}end end m=m+8 l=l+1 end
i=j j=e.find(b,";",j+1)h=h+1 end return g end
C=a(H)W={}k=1
while C and C[k]do o,S,L,cr,cg,cb,ca=1,-1,0,-1,-1,-1,-1
while C[k][o]~=nil do P=C[k][o]
if P then if P[1]==cr and P[2]==cg and P[3]==cb and P[4]==ca then L=L+1 else
if L>0 then W[#W+1]={S,k,L,cr,cg,cb,ca}end S,L,cr,cg,cb,ca=o,1,P[1],P[2],P[3],P[4]end
elseif L>0 then W[#W+1]={S,k,L,cr,cg,cb,ca}L=0 end o=o+1 end
if L>0 then W[#W+1]={S,k,L,cr,cg,cb,ca}end k=k+1 end
function onTick()end
function onDraw()if not C then return end
for i=1,#W do local c=W[i]x.setColor(c[4]*t,c[5]*t,c[6]*t,c[7]*E)x.drawRectF(y+c[1]-1,z+D-2+c[2],c[3],1)end end

e=string p=tonumber x=screen t=0.4 y=0 z=0 E=1
function a(b)
c=1 while d[c]do b=e.gsub(b,d[c][2],d[c][1])c=c+1 end
c=1 while f[c]do b=e.gsub(b,f[c][2],f[c][1])c=c+1 end
g={}h=1 i=0 j=e.find(b,";")
while j do g[h]={}k=e.sub(b,i+1,j)l=1 m=0
while m<e.len(k)do o=e.sub(k,m+1,m+8)
if o~=";"then c=p("0x"..e.sub(o,1,2))q=p("0x"..e.sub(o,3,4))r=p("0x"..e.sub(o,5,6))s=p("0x"..e.sub(o,7,8))
if s==0 then g[h][l]=false else g[h][l]={c,q,r,s}end end m=m+8 l=l+1 end
i=j j=e.find(b,";",j+1)h=h+1 end return g end
C=a(H)W={}k=1
while C and C[k]do o,S,L,cr,cg,cb,ca=1,-1,0,-1,-1,-1,-1
while C[k][o]~=nil do P=C[k][o]
if P then if P[1]==cr and P[2]==cg and P[3]==cb and P[4]==ca then L=L+1 else
if L>0 then W[#W+1]={S,k,L,cr,cg,cb,ca}end S,L,cr,cg,cb,ca=o,1,P[1],P[2],P[3],P[4]end
elseif L>0 then W[#W+1]={S,k,L,cr,cg,cb,ca}L=0 end o=o+1 end
if L>0 then W[#W+1]={S,k,L,cr,cg,cb,ca}end k=k+1 end
function onTick()end
function onDraw()if not C then return end
for i=1,#W do local c=W[i]x.setColor(c[4]*t,c[5]*t,c[6]*t,c[7]*E)x.drawRectF(y+c[1]-1,z+D-2+c[2],c[3],1)end end

e=string p=tonumber x=screen t=0.4 y=0 z=0 E=1
function a(b)
c=1 while d[c]do b=e.gsub(b,d[c][2],d[c][1])c=c+1 end
c=1 while f[c]do b=e.gsub(b,f[c][2],f[c][1])c=c+1 end
g={}h=1 i=0 j=e.find(b,";")
while j do g[h]={}k=e.sub(b,i+1,j)l=1 m=0
while m<e.len(k)do o=e.sub(k,m+1,m+8)
if o~=";"then c=p("0x"..e.sub(o,1,2))q=p("0x"..e.sub(o,3,4))r=p("0x"..e.sub(o,5,6))s=p("0x"..e.sub(o,7,8))
if s==0 then g[h][l]=false else g[h][l]={c,q,r,s}end end m=m+8 l=l+1 end
i=j j=e.find(b,";",j+1)h=h+1 end return g end
C=a(H)W={}k=1
while C and C[k]do o,S,L,cr,cg,cb,ca=1,-1,0,-1,-1,-1,-1
while C[k][o]~=nil do P=C[k][o]
if P then if P[1]==cr and P[2]==cg and P[3]==cb and P[4]==ca then L=L+1 else
if L>0 then W[#W+1]={S,k,L,cr,cg,cb,ca}end S,L,cr,cg,cb,ca=o,1,P[1],P[2],P[3],P[4]end
elseif L>0 then W[#W+1]={S,k,L,cr,cg,cb,ca}L=0 end o=o+1 end
if L>0 then W[#W+1]={S,k,L,cr,cg,cb,ca}end k=k+1 end
function onTick()end
function onDraw()if not C then return end
for i=1,#W do local c=W[i]x.setColor(c[4]*t,c[5]*t,c[6]*t,c[7]*E)x.drawRectF(y+c[1]-1,z+D-2+c[2],c[3],1)end end

e=string p=tonumber x=screen --yyy-- function a(b) c=1 while d[c]do b=e.gsub(b,d[c][2],d[c][1]) c=c+1 end c=1 while f[c]do b=e.gsub(b,f[c][2],f[c][1]) c=c+1 end g={} h=1 i=0 j=e.find(b,";" ) while j do g[h]={} k=e.sub(b,i+1,j) l=1 m=0 while m< e.len(k)do n=e.sub(k,m+1,m+1) o=e.sub(k,m+1,m+8) if not(o==";" )then c=p("0x" ..e.sub(o,1,2)) q=p("0x" ..e.sub(o,3,4)) r=p("0x" ..e.sub(o,5,6)) s=p("0x" u(v,w,c,q,r,s) if not c then c=0 end if not q then q=0 end if not r then r=0 end if not s then s=0 end x.setColor(c*t,q*t,r*t,s) x.drawRectF(v-1,w-1,1,1) end y=0 z=0 function onDraw() A=x.getWidth() d={{"pa","A"},{"#4!","B"},{"Ieyy","C"},{"=6z","D"},{",,,","E"},{"Rc:","F"},{"-3!","J"},{"fd:","K"},{"y:","L"},{":t","M"},{"1y","N"},{"qz","P"},{"#5","O"},{"-4","Q"},{"bf","R"},{"f4","S"},{"Ief","T"},{"nb:","U"},{"bfd:efbfd","j"},{":1!","k"},{":d:e:d:e:","l"},{"6f","m"},{"af","n"},{"9f","p"},{"001~","o"},{":2","q"},{"8f","r"},{"d_cfd_cfd","s"},{"7f","t"},{"c:e:c:e:c","u"},{":6f","v"},{"f1","y"},{"f3","z"},{"f2","!"},{":5f","="},{"f00ef","~"},{":4f","#"},{":3f","-"},{":efcfd:ef","_"},{"IefIefIef",","},{"fef",":"}} e=string p=tonumber x=screen t=0.4 y=0 z=0 E=1
function a(b)
c=1 while d[c]do b=e.gsub(b,d[c][2],d[c][1])c=c+1 end
c=1 while f[c]do b=e.gsub(b,f[c][2],f[c][1])c=c+1 end
g={}h=1 i=0 j=e.find(b,";")
while j do g[h]={}k=e.sub(b,i+1,j)l=1 m=0
while m<e.len(k)do o=e.sub(k,m+1,m+8)
if o~=";"then c=p("0x"..e.sub(o,1,2))q=p("0x"..e.sub(o,3,4))r=p("0x"..e.sub(o,5,6))s=p("0x"..e.sub(o,7,8))
if s==0 then g[h][l]=false else g[h][l]={c,q,r,s}end end m=m+8 l=l+1 end
i=j j=e.find(b,";",j+1)h=h+1 end return g end
C=a(H)W={}k=1
while C and C[k]do o,S,L,cr,cg,cb,ca=1,-1,0,-1,-1,-1,-1
while C[k][o]~=nil do P=C[k][o]
if P then if P[1]==cr and P[2]==cg and P[3]==cb and P[4]==ca then L=L+1 else
if L>0 then W[#W+1]={S,k,L,cr,cg,cb,ca}end S,L,cr,cg,cb,ca=o,1,P[1],P[2],P[3],P[4]end
elseif L>0 then W[#W+1]={S,k,L,cr,cg,cb,ca}L=0 end o=o+1 end
if L>0 then W[#W+1]={S,k,L,cr,cg,cb,ca}end k=k+1 end
function onTick()end
function onDraw()if not C then return end
for i=1,#W do local c=W[i]x.setColor(c[4]*t,c[5]*t,c[6]*t,c[7]*E)x.drawRectF(y+c[1]-1,z+D-2+c[2],c[3],1)end end

d={{"pa","A"},{"#4!","B"},{"Ieyy","C"},{"=6z","D"},{",,,","E"},{"Rc:","F"},{"-3!","J"},{"fd:","K"},{"y:","L"},{":t","M"},{"1y","N"},{"qz","P"},{"#5","O"},{"-4","Q"},{"bf","R"},{"f4","S"},{"Ief","T"},{"nb:","U"},{"bfd:efbfd","j"},{":1!","k"},{":d:e:d:e:","l"},{"6f","m"},{"af","n"},{"9f","p"},{"001~","o"},{":2","q"},{"8f","r"},{"d_cfd_cfd","s"},{"7f","t"},{"c:e:c:e:c","u"},{":6f","v"},{"f1","y"},{"f3","z"},{"f2","!"},{":5f","="},{"f00ef","~"},{":4f","#"},{":3f","-"},{":efcfd:ef","_"},{"IefIefIef",","},{"fef",":"}} e=string p=tonumber x=screen t=0.4 y=0 z=0 E=1
function a(b)
c=1 while d[c]do b=e.gsub(b,d[c][2],d[c][1])c=c+1 end
c=1 while f[c]do b=e.gsub(b,f[c][2],f[c][1])c=c+1 end
g={}h=1 i=0 j=e.find(b,";")
while j do g[h]={}k=e.sub(b,i+1,j)l=1 m=0
while m<e.len(k)do o=e.sub(k,m+1,m+8)
if o~=";"then c=p("0x"..e.sub(o,1,2))q=p("0x"..e.sub(o,3,4))r=p("0x"..e.sub(o,5,6))s=p("0x"..e.sub(o,7,8))
if s==0 then g[h][l]=false else g[h][l]={c,q,r,s}end end m=m+8 l=l+1 end
i=j j=e.find(b,";",j+1)h=h+1 end return g end
C=a(H)W={}k=1
while C and C[k]do o,S,L,cr,cg,cb,ca=1,-1,0,-1,-1,-1,-1
while C[k][o]~=nil do P=C[k][o]
if P then if P[1]==cr and P[2]==cg and P[3]==cb and P[4]==ca then L=L+1 else
if L>0 then W[#W+1]={S,k,L,cr,cg,cb,ca}end S,L,cr,cg,cb,ca=o,1,P[1],P[2],P[3],P[4]end
elseif L>0 then W[#W+1]={S,k,L,cr,cg,cb,ca}L=0 end o=o+1 end
if L>0 then W[#W+1]={S,k,L,cr,cg,cb,ca}end k=k+1 end
function onTick()end
function onDraw()if not C then return end
for i=1,#W do local c=W[i]x.setColor(c[4]*t,c[5]*t,c[6]*t,c[7]*E)x.drawRectF(y+c[1]-1,z+D-2+c[2],c[3],1)end end

d={{"q:","A"},{"-d","B"},{"o:","C"},{"r:","D"},{"IefIe","E"},{"1!","F"},{"-1S-1S-1S","J"},{"f#e:","K"},{"fb","L"},{"2j#2j#2j#","M"},{"#3v#3v#3v","N"},{"y:","P"},{"fa","O"},{"f9","Q"},{"-#5-#5-#5","R"},{"f8","S"},{"f7","T"},{"#8-#8-#8-","U"},{"fc:","j"},{"~z","k"},{"=:","l"},{"#4v#4v#4v","m"},{"-1f9-1f9-","n"},{":e:","p"},{"f6","o"},{"f5","q"},{"f4","r"},{"#6-#6-#6-","s"},{"~:","t"},{"#7-#7-#7-","u"},{"fd:","v"},{"f3","y"},{"f,","z"},{"f#,","!"},{"f2","="},{"f1","~"},{"00","#"},{":ef","-"},{"IefIefIef","_"},{"00ef",","},{"fef",":"}} e=string p=tonumber x=screen t=0.4 y=0 z=0 E=1
function a(b)
c=1 while d[c]do b=e.gsub(b,d[c][2],d[c][1])c=c+1 end
c=1 while f[c]do b=e.gsub(b,f[c][2],f[c][1])c=c+1 end
g={}h=1 i=0 j=e.find(b,";")
while j do g[h]={}k=e.sub(b,i+1,j)l=1 m=0
while m<e.len(k)do o=e.sub(k,m+1,m+8)
if o~=";"then c=p("0x"..e.sub(o,1,2))q=p("0x"..e.sub(o,3,4))r=p("0x"..e.sub(o,5,6))s=p("0x"..e.sub(o,7,8))
if s==0 then g[h][l]=false else g[h][l]={c,q,r,s}end end m=m+8 l=l+1 end
i=j j=e.find(b,";",j+1)h=h+1 end return g end
C=a(H)W={}k=1
while C and C[k]do o,S,L,cr,cg,cb,ca=1,-1,0,-1,-1,-1,-1
while C[k][o]~=nil do P=C[k][o]
if P then if P[1]==cr and P[2]==cg and P[3]==cb and P[4]==ca then L=L+1 else
if L>0 then W[#W+1]={S,k,L,cr,cg,cb,ca}end S,L,cr,cg,cb,ca=o,1,P[1],P[2],P[3],P[4]end
elseif L>0 then W[#W+1]={S,k,L,cr,cg,cb,ca}L=0 end o=o+1 end
if L>0 then W[#W+1]={S,k,L,cr,cg,cb,ca}end k=k+1 end
function onTick()end
function onDraw()if not C then return end
for i=1,#W do local c=W[i]x.setColor(c[4]*t,c[5]*t,c[6]*t,c[7]*E)x.drawRectF(y+c[1]-1,z+D-2+c[2],c[3],1)end end

d={{"q:","A"},{"-d","B"},{"o:","C"},{"r:","D"},{"IefIe","E"},{"1!","F"},{"-1S-1S-1S","J"},{"f#e:","K"},{"fb","L"},{"2j#2j#2j#","M"},{"#3v#3v#3v","N"},{"y:","P"},{"fa","O"},{"f9","Q"},{"-#5-#5-#5","R"},{"f8","S"},{"f7","T"},{"#8-#8-#8-","U"},{"fc:","j"},{"~z","k"},{"=:","l"},{"#4v#4v#4v","m"},{"-1f9-1f9-","n"},{":e:","p"},{"f6","o"},{"f5","q"},{"f4","r"},{"#6-#6-#6-","s"},{"~:","t"},{"#7-#7-#7-","u"},{"fd:","v"},{"f3","y"},{"f,","z"},{"f#,","!"},{"f2","="},{"f1","~"},{"00","#"},{":ef","-"},{"IefIefIef","_"},{"00ef",","},{"fef",":"}} e=string p=tonumber x=screen t=0.4 y=0 z=0 E=1
function a(b)
c=1 while d[c]do b=e.gsub(b,d[c][2],d[c][1])c=c+1 end
c=1 while f[c]do b=e.gsub(b,f[c][2],f[c][1])c=c+1 end
g={}h=1 i=0 j=e.find(b,";")
while j do g[h]={}k=e.sub(b,i+1,j)l=1 m=0
while m<e.len(k)do o=e.sub(k,m+1,m+8)
if o~=";"then c=p("0x"..e.sub(o,1,2))q=p("0x"..e.sub(o,3,4))r=p("0x"..e.sub(o,5,6))s=p("0x"..e.sub(o,7,8))
if s==0 then g[h][l]=false else g[h][l]={c,q,r,s}end end m=m+8 l=l+1 end
i=j j=e.find(b,";",j+1)h=h+1 end return g end
C=a(H)W={}k=1
while C and C[k]do o,S,L,cr,cg,cb,ca=1,-1,0,-1,-1,-1,-1
while C[k][o]~=nil do P=C[k][o]
if P then if P[1]==cr and P[2]==cg and P[3]==cb and P[4]==ca then L=L+1 else
if L>0 then W[#W+1]={S,k,L,cr,cg,cb,ca}end S,L,cr,cg,cb,ca=o,1,P[1],P[2],P[3],P[4]end
elseif L>0 then W[#W+1]={S,k,L,cr,cg,cb,ca}L=0 end o=o+1 end
if L>0 then W[#W+1]={S,k,L,cr,cg,cb,ca}end k=k+1 end
function onTick()end
function onDraw()if not C then return end

d={{"q:","A"},{"-d","B"},{"o:","C"},{"r:","D"},{"IefIe","E"},{"1!","F"},{"-1S-1S-1S","J"},{"f#e:","K"},{"fb","L"},{"2j#2j#2j#","M"},{"#3v#3v#3v","N"},{"y:","P"},{"fa","O"},{"f9","Q"},{"-#5-#5-#5","R"},{"f8","S"},{"f7","T"},{"#8-#8-#8-","U"},{"fc:","j"},{"~z","k"},{"=:","l"},{"#4v#4v#4v","m"},{"-1f9-1f9-","n"},{":e:","p"},{"f6","o"},{"f5","q"},{"f4","r"},{"#6-#6-#6-","s"},{"~:","t"},{"#7-#7-#7-","u"},{"fd:","v"},{"f3","y"},{"f,","z"},{"f#,","!"},{"f2","="},{"f1","~"},{"00","#"},{":ef","-"},{"IefIefIef","_"},{"00ef",","},{"fef",":"}} e=string p=tonumber x=screen t=0.4 y=0 z=0 E=1
function a(b)
c=1 while d[c]do b=e.gsub(b,d[c][2],d[c][1])c=c+1 end
c=1 while f[c]do b=e.gsub(b,f[c][2],f[c][1])c=c+1 end
g={}h=1 i=0 j=e.find(b,";")
while j do g[h]={}k=e.sub(b,i+1,j)l=1 m=0
while m<e.len(k)do o=e.sub(k,m+1,m+8)
if o~=";"then c=p("0x"..e.sub(o,1,2))q=p("0x"..e.sub(o,3,4))r=p("0x"..e.sub(o,5,6))s=p("0x"..e.sub(o,7,8))
if s==0 then g[h][l]=false else g[h][l]={c,q,r,s}end end m=m+8 l=l+1 end
i=j j=e.find(b,";",j+1)h=h+1 end return g end
C=a(H)W={}k=1
while C and C[k]do o,S,L,cr,cg,cb,ca=1,-1,0,-1,-1,-1,-1
while C[k][o]~=nil do P=C[k][o]
if P then if P[1]==cr and P[2]==cg and P[3]==cb and P[4]==ca then L=L+1 else
if L>0 then W[#W+1]={S,k,L,cr,cg,cb,ca}end S,L,cr,cg,cb,ca=o,1,P[1],P[2],P[3],P[4]end
elseif L>0 then W[#W+1]={S,k,L,cr,cg,cb,ca}L=0 end o=o+1 end
if L>0 then W[#W+1]={S,k,L,cr,cg,cb,ca}end k=k+1 end
function onTick()end
function onDraw()if not C then return end
for i=1,#W do local c=W[i]x.setColor(c[4]*t,c[5]*t,c[6]*t,c[7]*E)x.drawRectF(y+c[1]-1,z+D-2+c[2],c[3],1)end end

e=string p=tonumber x=screen t=0.4 y=0 z=0 E=1
function a(b)
c=1 while d[c]do b=e.gsub(b,d[c][2],d[c][1])c=c+1 end
c=1 while f[c]do b=e.gsub(b,f[c][2],f[c][1])c=c+1 end
g={}h=1 i=0 j=e.find(b,";")
while j do g[h]={}k=e.sub(b,i+1,j)l=1 m=0
while m<e.len(k)do o=e.sub(k,m+1,m+8)
if o~=";"then c=p("0x"..e.sub(o,1,2))q=p("0x"..e.sub(o,3,4))r=p("0x"..e.sub(o,5,6))s=p("0x"..e.sub(o,7,8))
if s==0 then g[h][l]=false else g[h][l]={c,q,r,s}end end m=m+8 l=l+1 end
i=j j=e.find(b,";",j+1)h=h+1 end return g end
C=a(H)W={}k=1
while C and C[k]do o,S,L,cr,cg,cb,ca=1,-1,0,-1,-1,-1,-1
while C[k][o]~=nil do P=C[k][o]
if P then if P[1]==cr and P[2]==cg and P[3]==cb and P[4]==ca then L=L+1 else
if L>0 then W[#W+1]={S,k,L,cr,cg,cb,ca}end S,L,cr,cg,cb,ca=o,1,P[1],P[2],P[3],P[4]end
elseif L>0 then W[#W+1]={S,k,L,cr,cg,cb,ca}L=0 end o=o+1 end
if L>0 then W[#W+1]={S,k,L,cr,cg,cb,ca}end k=k+1 end
function onTick()end
function onDraw()if not C then return end
for i=1,#W do local c=W[i]x.setColor(c[4]*t,c[5]*t,c[6]*t,c[7]*E)x.drawRectF(y+c[1]-1,z+D-2+c[2],c[3],1)end end

d={{"q:","A"},{"-d","B"},{"o:","C"},{"r:","D"},{"IefIe","E"},{"1!","F"},{"-1S-1S-1S","J"},{"f#e:","K"},{"fb","L"},{"2j#2j#2j#","M"},{"#3v#3v#3v","N"},{"y:","P"},{"fa","O"},{"f9","Q"},{"-#5-#5-#5","R"},{"f8","S"},{"f7","T"},{"#8-#8-#8-","U"},{"fc:","j"},{"~z","k"},{"=:","l"},{"#4v#4v#4v","m"},{"-1f9-1f9-","n"},{":e:","p"},{"f6","o"},{"f5","q"},{"f4","r"},{"#6-#6-#6-","s"},{"~:","t"},{"#7-#7-#7-","u"},{"fd:","v"},{"f3","y"},{"f,","z"},{"f#,","!"},{"f2","="},{"f1","~"},{"00","#"},{":ef","-"},{"IefIefIef","_"},{"00ef",","},{"fef",":"}} e=string p=tonumber x=screen t=0.4 y=0 z=0 E=1
function a(b)
c=1 while d[c]do b=e.gsub(b,d[c][2],d[c][1])c=c+1 end
c=1 while f[c]do b=e.gsub(b,f[c][2],f[c][1])c=c+1 end
g={}h=1 i=0 j=e.find(b,";")
while j do g[h]={}k=e.sub(b,i+1,j)l=1 m=0
while m<e.len(k)do o=e.sub(k,m+1,m+8)
if o~=";"then c=p("0x"..e.sub(o,1,2))q=p("0x"..e.sub(o,3,4))r=p("0x"..e.sub(o,5,6))s=p("0x"..e.sub(o,7,8))
if s==0 then g[h][l]=false else g[h][l]={c,q,r,s}end end m=m+8 l=l+1 end
i=j j=e.find(b,";",j+1)h=h+1 end return g end
C=a(H)W={}k=1
while C and C[k]do o,S,L,cr,cg,cb,ca=1,-1,0,-1,-1,-1,-1
while C[k][o]~=nil do P=C[k][o]
if P then if P[1]==cr and P[2]==cg and P[3]==cb and P[4]==ca then L=L+1 else
if L>0 then W[#W+1]={S,k,L,cr,cg,cb,ca}end S,L,cr,cg,cb,ca=o,1,P[1],P[2],P[3],P[4]end
elseif L>0 then W[#W+1]={S,k,L,cr,cg,cb,ca}L=0 end o=o+1 end
if L>0 then W[#W+1]={S,k,L,cr,cg,cb,ca}end k=k+1 end
function onTick()end
function onDraw()if not C then return end
for i=1,#W do local c=W[i]x.setColor(c[4]*t,c[5]*t,c[6]*t,c[7]*E)x.drawRectF(y+c[1]-1,z+D-2+c[2],c[3],1)end end

e=string p=tonumber x=screen t=0.4 y=0 z=0 E=1
function a(b)
c=1 while d[c]do b=e.gsub(b,d[c][2],d[c][1])c=c+1 end
c=1 while f[c]do b=e.gsub(b,f[c][2],f[c][1])c=c+1 end
g={}h=1 i=0 j=e.find(b,";")
while j do g[h]={}k=e.sub(b,i+1,j)l=1 m=0
while m<e.len(k)do o=e.sub(k,m+1,m+8)
if o~=";"then c=p("0x"..e.sub(o,1,2))q=p("0x"..e.sub(o,3,4))r=p("0x"..e.sub(o,5,6))s=p("0x"..e.sub(o,7,8))
if s==0 then g[h][l]=false else g[h][l]={c,q,r,s}end end m=m+8 l=l+1 end
i=j j=e.find(b,";",j+1)h=h+1 end return g end
C=a(H)W={}k=1
while C and C[k]do o,S,L,cr,cg,cb,ca=1,-1,0,-1,-1,-1,-1
while C[k][o]~=nil do P=C[k][o]
if P then if P[1]==cr and P[2]==cg and P[3]==cb and P[4]==ca then L=L+1 else
if L>0 then W[#W+1]={S,k,L,cr,cg,cb,ca}end S,L,cr,cg,cb,ca=o,1,P[1],P[2],P[3],P[4]end
elseif L>0 then W[#W+1]={S,k,L,cr,cg,cb,ca}L=0 end o=o+1 end
if L>0 then W[#W+1]={S,k,L,cr,cg,cb,ca}end k=k+1 end
function onTick()end
function onDraw()if not C then return end
for i=1,#W do local c=W[i]x.setColor(c[4]*t,c[5]*t,c[6]*t,c[7]*E)x.drawRectF(y+c[1]-1,z+D-2+c[2],c[3],1)end end

Ma=math S=screen C=S.setColor dF=S.drawRectF dTX=S.drawText dTB=S.drawTextBox I=input O=output T=true function iR(rX,rY,rW,rH,t)return t and X>rX and Y>rY and X<rX+rW and Y<rY+rH end function ir(rX,u,rY)return iR(rX+u*9,rY,9,10,t)end function gN(...)local a={}for b,c in ipairs({...})do a[b]=I.getNumber(c)end;return table.unpack(a)end function onTick()W,H,X,Y=gN(1,2,3,4)t=I.getBool(1)n=W/2-46 m=H-63 onB=ir(n,0,m) twB=ir(n,1,m) thB=ir(n,2,m) foB=ir(n,3,m) fiB=ir(n,4,m) siB=ir(n,5,m) seB=ir(n,6,m) eiB=ir(n,7,m) niB=ir(n,8,m) zeB=ir(n,9,m)m=m+10 qB=ir(n,0,m) wB=ir(n,1,m) eB=ir(n,2,m) rB=ir(n,3,m) tB=ir(n,4,m) yB=ir(n,5,m) uB=ir(n,6,m) iB=ir(n,7,m) oB=ir(n,8,m) pB=ir(n,9,m)n=n+2+2 m=m+10 aB=ir(n,0,m) sB=ir(n,1,m) dB=ir(n,2,m) fB=ir(n,3,m) gB=ir(n,4,m) hB=ir(n,5,m) jB=ir(n,6,m) kB=ir(n,7,m) lB=ir(n,8,m)m=m+10 stB=iR(n-4,m,13,21,t) baB=iR(n+9*8,m,15,10,t) zB=ir(n,1,m) xB=ir(n,2,m) cB=ir(n,3,m) vB=ir(n,4,m) bB=ir(n,5,m) nB=ir(n,6,m) mB=ir(n,7,m)m=m+10 coB=ir(n,1,m) fuB=ir(n,7,m) spB=iR(n+9*2,m,44,10,t) et=iR(n+9*8,m,15,10,t) tab=iR(n-3,m,12,9,t)
ou=false if baB or et or tab then ou=T end if onB or twB or thB or foB or fiB or siB or seB or eiB or niB or zeB then ou=T end if qB or wB or eB or rB or tB or yB or uB or iB or oB or pB then ou=T end if aB or sB or dB or fB or gB or hB or jB or kB or lB then ou=T end if zB or xB or cB or vB or bB or nB or mB then ou=T end if spB or coB or cB or fuB or bB or nB or mB then ou=T end O.setBool(1,ou) end

function dRC(a,b,c,d,e,f,g,h)dTF(a,b,c,d,e,f)dTF(e,f,g,h,c,d)end function dS(x,y,w,h)if w~=0 then dF(x+1,y,w-2,h)dF(x,y+1,1,h-2)dF(x+w-1,y+1,1,h-2)end end function dd(v,d)d=d or 0 return tonumber(string.format("%."..d.."f",v))end function clamp(a,b,c) return M.min(M.max(a,b),c)end function gN(...)local a={}for b,c in ipairs({...})do a[b]=I.getNumber(c)end;return tU(a)end function d(x,y)dF(x,y,1,1)end
function c(s,a)a=a or 255 r,g,b=243,243,243 if s==0 then r,g,b=146,160,169 end if s==1 then r,g,b=125,125,125 end if s==2 then r,g,b=75,75,75 end if s==3 then r,g,b=50,50,50 end if s==4 then r,g,b=25,25,25 end if s==5 then r,g,b=15,15,15 end if s==9 then r,g,b=0,0,0 end if s==11 then r,g,b=150,0,0 end if s==41 then r,g,b=0,50,0 end if s==42 then r,g,b=0,35,0 end if s==51 then r,g,b=0,85,85 end if s==52 then r,g,b=0,19,150 end if s==53 then r,g,b=0,38,255 end if s==54 then r,g,b=0,38,65 end C(r,g,b,clamp(0,a,255))end
function su() count=255 --right shade ani=0 --offset aa=255 --left shade end
su() av=0 --dimS A=0 --cursor
chX=false chT=0 chV=0 --msg grad
function onTick() W1,H,iX,iY,ti=gN(1,2,3,4,5)iP=I.getBool(1)dimS=I.getBool(5)sd=I.getBool(6)chB=I.getBool(8)
if iP and A<255 then A=A+25 end if not iP and A>0 then A=A-25 end A=clamp(0,A,255)
if sd then start=false end if count<=0 then start=true end
if iP and count>0 then count=count-2*2 end if not iP and count<255 and count~=0 then count=count+2*2 end
if start then sig=true count=0 end if sd then sig=false if count<255 then count=count+2 end end output.setBool(1,sig)
if chB then chX=true end if chX then chT=chT+1 end if chT>150 then chX=false chT=0 end
aa=clamp(0,aa,255) count=clamp(0,count,255) end
function onDraw()w=S.getWidth()h=S.getHeight()cw=w/2 ch=h/2 ssi=w*h
GradH(0,0,w,h,0,0,0,aa,0,0,0,count) if count<1 then if ani<110 then ani=ani+1.5 end if aa>0 then aa=aa-17 end end
c(3,aa)LO(9-ani,ch-3)
--shutdown seq if not start then ani=0 if aa<255 then aa=aa+17 end end
--c(255,255)dTB(1,1,w-1,5,aa,-1,-1)dTB(1,1,w-1,5,count,1,1) --dTB(1,1,w-1,5,ani,0,0)
if chX and not start then chV=clamp(0,chV+17,255)else chV=clamp(0,chV-17,255)end GRV(0,h-h/4,w,h/4,0,0,0,0,0,19,50,chV)c(3,chV)dTB(0,h-15,w,5,"New Message",0,0)
cur(iX,iY,A) if dimS and av<128 then av=av+2 end if not dimS and av>0 then av=av-2 end c(9,av)dF(0,0,w,h)
end
function cur(x,y,A)c(-1,A)dF(x+1,y+2,1,3)dF(x+2,y+3,1,2)C(0,0,0,A)dF(x,y,1,7)dL(x,y,x+5,y+5)dF(x+1,y+5,2,1)dF(x+2,y+6,2,2)d(x+3,y+4)end function GradH(x,y,w,h,r1,g1,b1,t1,r2,g2,b2,t2) for i=0,w,1 do C(r1+i*((r2-r1)/w),g1+i*((g2-g1)/w),b1+i*((b2-b1)/w),t1+i*((t2-t1)/w)) dF(x+i,y,1,h)end end function LO(x,y)dF(x+0,y+0.5,4,4)dF(x+5,y+0.5,4,4)dF(x+5,y+5.5,4,4)dF(x+0,y+5.5,4,4)dR(x+2,y+2,4,4)dR(x+3,y+3,2,2)dTX(x+11,y+2,"Long press to wake")end
function GRV(x,y,w,h,r1,g1,b1,o1,r2,g2,b2,o2) for i=0,h,1 do C(r1+i*((r2-r1)/h),g1+i*((g2-g1)/h),b1+i*((b2-b1)/h),o1+i*((o2-o1)/h)) dF(x,y+i,w,1)end end

S=screen DRF=S.drawRectF DL=S.drawLine DTX=S.drawText mult=property.getNumber("Darkness Multiplier") function SC(r,g,b,a) screen.setColor(r*mult,g*mult,b*mult,a or 255) end function onDraw()
SC(15,22,32) DRF(0,88.5,160,8) SC(35,45,60) DL(0,88,159.25,88.25) DTX(71,90,"Right")
end

S=screen DRF=S.drawRectF DL=S.drawLine DTX=S.drawText mult=property.getNumber("Darkness Multiplier") function SC(r,g,b,a) screen.setColor(r*mult,g*mult,b*mult,a or 255) end function onDraw()
SC(15,22,32) DRF(0,88.5,160,8) SC(35,45,60) DL(0,88,159.25,88.25) DTX(71,90,"Left")
end

c=1 while d[c]do b=e.gsub(b,d[c][2],d[c][1])c=c+1 end
c=1 while f[c]do b=e.gsub(b,f[c][2],f[c][1])c=c+1 end
g={}h=1 i=0 j=e.find(b,";")
while j do g[h]={}k=e.sub(b,i+1,j)l=1 m=0
while m<e.len(k)do o=e.sub(k,m+1,m+8)
if o~=";"then c=p("0x"..e.sub(o,1,2))q=p("0x"..e.sub(o,3,4))r=p("0x"..e.sub(o,5,6))s=p("0x"..e.sub(o,7,8))
if s==0 then g[h][l]=false else g[h][l]={c,q,r,s}end end m=m+8 l=l+1 end
i=j j=e.find(b,";",j+1)h=h+1 end return g end
C=a(H)W={}k=1
while C and C[k]do o,S,L,cr,cg,cb,ca=1,-1,0,-1,-1,-1,-1
while C[k][o]~=nil do P=C[k][o]
if P then if P[1]==cr and P[2]==cg and P[3]==cb and P[4]==ca then L=L+1 else
if L>0 then W[#W+1]={S,k,L,cr,cg,cb,ca}end S,L,cr,cg,cb,ca=o,1,P[1],P[2],P[3],P[4]end
elseif L>0 then W[#W+1]={S,k,L,cr,cg,cb,ca}L=0 end o=o+1 end
if L>0 then W[#W+1]={S,k,L,cr,cg,cb,ca}end k=k+1 end
function onTick()end
function onDraw()if not C then return end
for i=1,#W do local c=W[i]x.setColor(c[4]*t,c[5]*t,c[6]*t,c[7]*E)x.drawRectF(y+c[1]-1,z+D-2+c[2],c[3],1)end end

e=string p=tonumber x=screen t=0.4 y=0 z=0 E=1
function a(b)
c=1 while d[c]do b=e.gsub(b,d[c][2],d[c][1])c=c+1 end
c=1 while f[c]do b=e.gsub(b,f[c][2],f[c][1])c=c+1 end
g={}h=1 i=0 j=e.find(b,";")
while j do g[h]={}k=e.sub(b,i+1,j)l=1 m=0
while m<e.len(k)do o=e.sub(k,m+1,m+8)
if o~=";"then c=p("0x"..e.sub(o,1,2))q=p("0x"..e.sub(o,3,4))r=p("0x"..e.sub(o,5,6))s=p("0x"..e.sub(o,7,8))
if s==0 then g[h][l]=false else g[h][l]={c,q,r,s}end end m=m+8 l=l+1 end
i=j j=e.find(b,";",j+1)h=h+1 end return g end
C=a(H)W={}k=1
while C and C[k]do o,S,L,cr,cg,cb,ca=1,-1,0,-1,-1,-1,-1
while C[k][o]~=nil do P=C[k][o]
if P then if P[1]==cr and P[2]==cg and P[3]==cb and P[4]==ca then L=L+1 else
if L>0 then W[#W+1]={S,k,L,cr,cg,cb,ca}end S,L,cr,cg,cb,ca=o,1,P[1],P[2],P[3],P[4]end
elseif L>0 then W[#W+1]={S,k,L,cr,cg,cb,ca}L=0 end o=o+1 end
if L>0 then W[#W+1]={S,k,L,cr,cg,cb,ca}end k=k+1 end
function onTick()end
function onDraw()if not C then return end
for i=1,#W do local c=W[i]x.setColor(c[4]*t,c[5]*t,c[6]*t,c[7]*E)x.drawRectF(y+c[1]-1,z+D-2+c[2],c[3],1)end end

I = input O = output S = {} C=0
p_st, p_pp = false, false power_timer = 0 -- New variable to track the 60-tick countdown
function t(x, y, rectX, rectY, rectW, rectH) return x > rectX and y > rectY and x < rectX + rectW and y < rectY + rectH end
local rVal=127 local gVal=127 local bVal=127 local rKnobY=0 local gKnobY=0 local bKnobY=0 local sY = 13.5 local sH = 46.0 local sBottom = sY + sH local minTopLeftY = sY local maxTopLeftY = sBottom - 3 local travelDistance = maxTopLeftY - minTopLeftY
function onTick() local pp = I.getBool(3) local ix = I.getNumber(3) local iy = I.getNumber(4) local time = I.getNumber(2) local batt = I.getNumber(1) local currentSecs = I.getNumber(5) local totalSecs = I.getNumber(6)
-- Physical Play/Pause button debounce if pp and not p_pp then S[9] = not S[9] end p_pp = pp
-- Screen touch debounce local st = I.getBool(1) and I.getBool(2) local click = st and not p_st p_st = st
-- Power button countdown logic if power_timer > 0 then power_timer = power_timer - 1 if power_timer == 0 then S[1] = false -- Disable power output after 60 ticks end end
if click then if t(ix,iy,15,89,6,6) then S[2] = not S[2] end -- b: main menu if S[2] == false then S[4] = false end if S[2] then -- a: power button logic if t(ix,iy,52,64,6,6) then S[1] = true S[2] = false power_timer = 60 end
if t(ix,iy,43,64,6,6) then S[3] = not S[3] end -- c: night mode if t(ix,iy,34,64,6,6) then S[4] = not S[4] end -- d: lights menu if S[4] and t(ix,iy,31,4,12,3) then S[5] = not S[5] end -- e: lights on/off if t(ix,iy,25,64,6,6) then S[6] = not S[6] end -- f: heater if t(ix,iy,14,80,6,4) then S[7] = not S[7] end -- g: skip start if t(ix,iy,22,80,2,4) then S[8] = not S[8] end -- h: back 10s if t(ix,iy,27,80,2,4) then S[9] = not S[9] end -- i: play/pause if t(ix,iy,32,80,2,4) then S[10] = not S[10] end -- j: forward 10s if t(ix,iy,36,80,6,4) then S[11] = not S[11] end -- k: skip end end -- apps if t(ix,iy,22,89,6,6) then C=1 end if t(ix,iy,29,89,6,6) then C=2 end if t(ix,iy,36,89,4,6) then C=3 end if t(ix,iy,41,89,6,6) then C=4 end if t(ix,iy,48,89,6,6) then C=5 end if t(ix,iy,55,89,6,6) then C=6 end if t(ix,iy,62,89,6,6) then C=7 end if t(ix,iy,69,89,6,6) then C=8 end if t(ix,iy,76,89,6,6) then C=9 end
end
if st and S[4] then if ix >= 29 and ix <= 32 and iy >= sY and iy <= sBottom then local targetY = iy - 1.5 local clampedY = math.max(minTopLeftY, math.min(maxTopLeftY, targetY)) local pct = (maxTopLeftY - clampedY) / travelDistance rVal = math.floor(pct * 255) end

IB = input.getBool IN = input.getNumber OB = output.setBool ON = output.setNumber
hasLeftScreen = property.getBool("Is there a Left screen?") hasRightScreen = property.getBool("Is there a Right screen?")
function onTick() for i = 1, 9 do OB(i, IB(i)) end
local sel = IN(31)
local r_R = math.floor(sel / 1) % 10 local r_C = math.floor(sel / 10) % 10 local r_L = math.floor(sel / 100) % 10
local c_R = math.floor(sel / 1000) % 10 local c_C = math.floor(sel / 10000) % 10 local c_L = math.floor(sel / 100000) % 10
local l_R = math.floor(sel / 1000000) % 10 local l_C = math.floor(sel / 10000000) % 10 local l_L = math.floor(sel / 100000000) % 10
local final_l_L, final_l_R = l_L, l_R local final_c_L, final_c_R = c_L, c_R local final_r_L, final_r_R = r_L, r_R
if l_C > 0 then final_l_L, final_l_R = l_C, l_C end if c_C > 0 then final_c_L, final_c_R = c_C, c_C end if r_C > 0 then final_r_L, final_r_R = r_C, r_C end
local chosenApps = {0, 0, 0, 0, 0, 0}
if hasLeftScreen and hasRightScreen then chosenApps = {final_l_L, final_l_R, final_c_L, final_c_R, final_r_L, final_r_R} elseif hasLeftScreen and not hasRightScreen then chosenApps = {final_l_L, final_l_R, final_c_L, final_c_R, 0, 0} elseif not hasLeftScreen and hasRightScreen then chosenApps = {final_c_L, final_c_R, final_r_L, final_r_R, 0, 0} else chosenApps = {final_c_L, final_c_R, 0, 0, 0, 0} end
for i = 1, 6 do local appId = chosenApps[i] local outA, outB = 0, 0
if appId > 0 and appId <= 15 then local chA = (appId - 1) * 2 + 1 outA = IN(chA) outB = IN(chA + 1) end
ON((i - 1) * 2 + 1, outA) ON((i - 1) * 2 + 2, outB) end end
